name: Comunication Weaver Co.,Ltd.
summary: Comunication Weaver Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and supplies fiber optic transmission systems to state-owned corporate and financial industries primarily in South Korea. It offers PTN, CWDM/ROADM, MPLS-TP, MSPP, DOTS, and GPON products. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
